name: Automated Validation
description: Cross-reference and verify data against master records

content.title: Automated Validation
content.content:
# Automated Validation

AI-powered validation ensures data accuracy by cross-referencing against master records, business rules, and historical patterns.

## The Challenge

Data quality issues are costly:
- **Incorrect entries**: Typos, wrong values, mismatched records
- **Missing information**: Incomplete submissions
- **Inconsistencies**: Same entity with different names
- **Rule violations**: Business logic not followed

Manual validation is slow and inconsistent.

## AI-Powered Solution

```mermaid
graph TD
    A[Incoming Data] --> B[AI Validation Agent]
    
    B --> C{Format Valid?}
    C -->|No| D[Auto-Correct or Flag]
    C -->|Yes| E{Matches Master Data?}
    
    E -->|No| F[Fuzzy Match]
    F --> G{High Confidence?}
    G -->|Yes| H[Auto-Link]
    G -->|No| D
    
    E -->|Yes| I{Business Rules OK?}
    I -->|No| D
    I -->|Yes| J[Validated Data]
```

## Validation Layers

| Layer | Checks | Examples |
|-------|--------|----------|
| **Format** | Data types, required fields | Date format, numeric ranges |
| **Reference** | Existence in master data | Valid client ID, known product |
| **Consistency** | Cross-field logic | Start date before end date |
| **Business Rules** | Domain-specific rules | Coverage limits, exclusions |
| **Anomaly** | Statistical outliers | Unusually high amounts |

## Fuzzy Matching

AI handles real-world messiness:

```mermaid
graph LR
    A["ABC Corporation"] --> B[Fuzzy Match]
    C["ABC Corp."] --> B
    D["A.B.C. Corporation Inc."] --> B
    B --> E["ABC Corporation (Master)"]
```

## Automated Resolution

For common issues, AI can auto-resolve:

| Issue | Resolution |
|-------|------------|
| Typos in known values | Auto-correct to master value |
| Missing optional fields | Fill from context or defaults |
| Format variations | Normalize to standard format |
| Duplicate detection | Merge or flag for review |

## Benefits

- **Data Quality**: Catch errors before they propagate
- **Efficiency**: Validate thousands of records per second
- **Consistency**: Same rules applied every time
- **Learning**: Patterns from corrections improve future validation
